cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.20)
project(AppWrapper LANGUAGES CXX)

set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 17)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)

# APP_NAME is passed in from build.ps1
if(NOT DEFINED APP_NAME)
    set(APP_NAME "AppWrapper")
endif()

# ICON_RC_FILE is the generated .rc file (generated by build.ps1 before configure)
if(DEFINED ICON_RC_FILE)
    set(RC_SOURCE ${ICON_RC_FILE})
else()
    set(RC_SOURCE "")
endif()

add_executable(${APP_NAME} WIN32 main.cpp ${RC_SOURCE})

target_link_libraries(${APP_NAME} PRIVATE
    shell32
    ole32
    user32
    propsys
)

set_target_properties(${APP_NAME} PROPERTIES
    OUTPUT_NAME      ${APP_NAME}
    WIN32_EXECUTABLE TRUE   # /SUBSYSTEM:WINDOWS — no console window
)
